content.title: Light Luck Aura Card
content.message: A steady pace can keep the day open without asking you to force anything.
content.outfit: Choose balanced layers with one soft color near the collar.
content.beauty: Keep the face fresh and reduce anything that feels heavy.
content.social: Pick the low-pressure option first and let the next step stay easy.
content.ritual: Put both feet down and count five steady breaths.
content.avoid: Avoid rushing to answer every signal at once.
content.caption: Today I am carrying moonlit clover aura.
content.styleVibe: Moonlit Clover Aura with pearl white
